query:
SELECT id, title, 
  CASE WHEN examples LIKE '[%' OR examples LIKE '{%' THEN 'JSON' ELSE 'OK' END as examples_status,
  CASE WHEN legalBasis LIKE '[%' OR legalBasis LIKE '{%' THEN 'JSON' ELSE 'OK' END as legalBasis_status,
  CASE WHEN `procedure` LIKE '[%' OR `procedure` LIKE '{%' THEN 'JSON' ELSE 'OK' END as procedure_status,
  CASE WHEN description LIKE '[%' OR description LIKE '{%' THEN 'JSON' ELSE 'OK' END as description_status
FROM special_cases
WHERE examples LIKE '[%' OR examples LIKE '{%' 
   OR legalBasis LIKE '[%' OR legalBasis LIKE '{%'
   OR `procedure` LIKE '[%' OR `procedure` LIKE '{%'
   OR description LIKE '[%' OR description LIKE '{%'
ORDER BY id;
command:

  CASE WHEN examples LIKE '[%' OR examples LIKE '{%' THEN 'JSON' ELSE 'OK' END as examples_status,
  CASE WHEN legalBasis LIKE '[%' OR legalBasis LIKE '{%' THEN 'JSON' ELSE 'OK' END as legalBasis_status,
  CASE WHEN `procedure` LIKE '[%' OR `procedure` LIKE '{%' THEN 'JSON' ELSE 'OK' END as procedure_status,
  CASE WHEN description LIKE '[%' OR description LIKE '{%' THEN 'JSON' ELSE 'OK' END as description_status
FROM special_cases
WHERE examples LIKE '[%' OR examples LIKE '{%' 
   OR legalBasis LIKE '[%' OR legalBasis LIKE '{%'
   OR `procedure` LIKE '[%' OR `procedure` LIKE '{%'
   OR description LIKE '[%' OR description LIKE '{%'
ORDER BY id;
